testsuite.name: OllamaService Unit Tests

testcase.name: suggestTaskFromDescription should handle invalid JSON response
suggestTaskFromDescription should handle markdown code blocks
suggestTaskFromDescription should set defaults when Ollama unavailable

testsuite.system-out: 2026-04-27 20:38:36 - Injected ObjectMapper returned null; retrying with a local mapper 2026-04-27 20:38:36 - Error parsing task from Ollama response
